module.name: prompt
module.purpose: Owns prompt templates used by model-facing steps, including raw strict JSON response requirements, no-Markdown-fence output constraints, single-string execution invocation input guidance, step formats that no longer expose Model output kinds, Plan-shaped examples that use run_steps, Initial answer-only JSON for no-step requests, and Intent text in the surrounding step description.

childModules.name: step
childModules.purpose: Owns step model prompt templates; Initial, Plan, ExecutionAnalysis, and Composition use Step kind format/reminder wording, run_steps Plan output, concrete Execution/User examples, and no model-facing Model step kind.
